content.body:
Introduces ast_languages.go with a languageHandler registry covering all
10 languages (Go, Python, JS, TS, TSX, Rust, Java, Ruby, C, C++, C#).
Each entry bundles the grammar, Scheme-style capture query, and file
extensions. A fast O(1) extension index is built at init time.

Rewrites extractor_ast.go to dispatch via the registry: Go retains its
hand-written walker (preserves doc-comment extraction); all other languages
use the generic extractViaQuery path (NewQuery → QueryCursor → NextMatch).
symbolKind() maps parent node types to canonical kind labels.

C query patched to unwrap pointer_declarator for pointer-return functions.

Tests: per-language assertions (15 tests total) + multi-language integration
test scanning the full testdata directory.

Binary: 9.5 MB → 26.6 MB (10 additional CGo grammar blobs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): multi-language AST registry + generic query runner
